title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 108.020 - Additional county indebtedness
text:
108.020.  Additional county indebtedness. — Any county in this state, by vote of the constitutionally required percentage of the voters voting thereon in favor of the question, may incur an indebtedness for county purposes in addition to that authorized in section 108.010 not to exceed five percent of the taxable tangible property shown as provided in that section.
(L. 1945 p. 597 § 3293, A.L. 1978 H.B. 971, A.L. 1990 H.B. 1621)
